In south, westerly or northwesterly 2 to 4, backing southwesterly 4 to 6 later. In north, westerly 3 or 4, backing southwesterly 4 or 5, then southerly 5 or 6 later.

Weather
In south, rain later. In north, showers, rain later.
Visibility
In south, good, occasionally moderate later. In north, good, occasionally poor later.
